questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the conversation.
Mina: I need a partner for our science fair.
Ece: Ask Lara. She always keeps her promises and helps everyone.
Question: Which adjective best describes Lara?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Promisesini tutan ve yardım eden kişi reliable olur.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]
questions.ipucu: Always keeps her promises ifadesine odaklan.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Deniz and Arda both enjoy chess, coding and reading comics.
They meet every Saturday to discuss new books.
Question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Ek Soru 1 — They have nothing in common.
Ek Soru 1 — They have many common interests.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Metinde ortak ilgi alanları açıkça verilmiştir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]
questions.ipucu: Both enjoy kelime grubunu takip et.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the conversation.
Kerem: What is Elif like?
Sude: She never lies and she shares her notes with us.
Question: Which option fits Elif?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Never lies ve shares notes, honest ve generous anlamına gelir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the profile cards.
Ada: supportive, punctual, calm
Cem: funny, but often breaks promises
Question: Who is a better study buddy?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Cem, because he is funny
Ek Soru 1 — Ada, because she is supportive and punctual
Ek Soru 1 — Cem, because he talks a lot
Ek Soru 1 — Ada, because she is silent
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Çalışma arkadaşı için destekleyici ve dakik olmak daha uygundur.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]
questions.ipucu: Study buddy için gerekli özellikleri düşün.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the message.
"I can't come to the cinema tonight. I promised my cousin to help with homework."
Question: Which value is highlighted?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Verilen sözü tutmak responsibility gösterir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the conversation.
Mert: Why don't we invite Bora?
Naz: I don't trust him. He tells our secrets to others.
Question: Why does Naz avoid Bora?
options: Ek Soru 1 — He is too shy.
Ek Soru 1 — He is not trustworthy.
Ek Soru 1 — He is new at school.
Ek Soru 1 — He studies too much.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Sır paylaşmak güven sorunu yaratır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]
questions.ipucu: Tells our secrets kısmına dikkat et.

questions.question:
Read the class poll.
'A true friend always...'
- listens carefully (48%)
- supports in hard times (38%)
- buys gifts (23%)
Question: What do students value most?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — En yüksek oran listens carefully seçeneğidir.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the dialogue.
Aylin: I'm stressed before exams.
Duru: Don't worry. I can test you every evening.
Question: Duru is being ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Yardım teklifi supportive davranıştır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Eren never laughs at his friends' mistakes and always uses kind words.
Question: Which statement matches this behavior?
options: Ek Soru 1 — A good friend encourages.
Ek Soru 1 — A good friend humiliates others.
Ek Soru 1 — A good friend ignores problems.
Ek Soru 1 — A good friend competes all the time.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Kind words ve saygı, encouragement davranışıdır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]
questions.ipucu: Never laughs at mistakes ifadesine odaklan.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the context.
Your friend is absent for a week and misses important lessons.
Question: Which action shows true friendship?
options: Ek Soru 1 — Share notes and explain topics
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Not paylaşmak ve konuları anlatmak destekleyici davranıştır.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

Mina: I need a partner for our science fair.
Ece: Ask Lara. She always keeps her promises.
Question: Which adjective best describes Lara?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Keeps promises = reliable.

Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Deniz and Arda both enjoy chess and reading comics.
Question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Ek Soru 1 — They have nothing in common.
Ek Soru 1 — They have many common interests.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Metinde ortak ilgi alanları var.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Fill in the blank.
My friend always helps others. She is very ___.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Karşılıksız yardım = generous.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Lucy's friend Mia never lies.
Question: Mia is ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Never lies = honest.

questions.question: Ek Soru 1 — Which word is NOT friendly?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Selfish olumsuz bir sıfattır.

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Dialogue.
Ben: I prefer working alone. I am shy.
Sue: I love meeting new people.
Question: Ben is ___, Sue is ___.
options: Ek Soru 1 — Ben shy, Sue outgoing
Ek Soru 1 — Sue shy, Ben outgoing
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Ben shy, Sue outgoing.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Grammar.
Good friends ___ always there for each other.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Good friends çoğul → are.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Alex and Nina live on the same street.
Question: What is true?
options: Ek Soru 1 — They live near each other.
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Same street = yakın.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Vocabulary.
Tom is a loyal friend. He always supports me.
'Loyal' means ...
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Loyal = faithful = sadık.

[GitHub Ek Test — Friendship]

questions.question:
Ek Soru 1 — Read the text.
Zoe makes me laugh. A good friend should be funny and kind.
Question: Good friend qualities?
questions.explanation:
Ek Soru 1 — Funny and kind denmiş.
